title: Welcome to CS5610 Web Development
author: All Sections
content: Welcome to CS5610 Web Development! Please review the syllabus and finish the setup for Web Foundations & Tooling before our first session.

title: Office Hours & Help
author: All Sections
content: Office hours run twice a week. Bring questions on HTML & Semantic Markup and the first assignment.

title: Modern JavaScript (ES6+) Resources Posted
author: All Sections
content: Extra readings and examples for modern javascript (es6+) are now under Modules. They will help with the upcoming assignment.

title: Midterm Exam Details
author: All Sections
content: The midterm covers weeks 1 through 5, is worth 67 points, and is held during the regular session. Review the study guide under Modules.

title: Final Grades Posted
author: All Sections
content: Final course grades have been posted. Thank you for a great semester - reach out with any questions.
